description: Maps each requirement type to the Revit evidence that exists, what it can prove, what it cannot prove, and what status is safe to assign.

Pipes.evidence_value: Material type encoded in Type name (Copper L, PVC SCH40, Steel SCH40). Size parameter available. Length available.

Pipe Fittings.evidence_value: Fitting type and material in family/type names. Connection sizes.

Electrical Fixtures.evidence_value: Outlet type in family name (GP, GFI, IG). Mounting height in type name. Panel and Circuit Number parameters.

Lighting Fixtures.evidence_value: Fixture type (LED, EXIT), size, mounting type in family name. Emergency designation in type name.

Pipe Accessories.evidence_value: Valve type and size in family/type. Limited to ball valves and PRVs.

Communication Devices.evidence_value: Device type (AV, clock, display, speaker) in family name.

Fire Alarm Devices.evidence_value: Device type (strobe/speaker, smoke detector, CO detector) in family name.

Data Devices.evidence_value: Outlet type (ceiling vs wall, port count) in family/type name.

Mechanical Equipment.evidence_value: Equipment type (RTU, exhaust fan) and tonnage in family/type name. Manufacturer implied by family (Aaon).

Security Devices.evidence_value: Device type (camera, card reader) and mounting (ceiling, wall) in family/type name.

Plumbing Fixtures.evidence_value: Fixture type (floor drain, hose bibb, water heater) and model in family/type name.

Electrical Equipment.evidence_value: Panel type, voltage, amperage in family/type name. Circuit parameters.

missing_categories_in_export: Conduit/Raceway - No conduit elements exported. Critical gap for conduit size requirements.
Cable Tray - No cable tray elements. Gap for cable tray separation requirements.
Sprinkler Heads - No dedicated sprinkler category. Fire protection gaps.
Controls/BMS Points - No BMS/BAS/DDC points. Critical gap for controls requirements.
Ductwork - No duct elements exported. Gap for duct-related requirements.
Wire/Cable - No wire/cable elements. Gap for conductor requirements.

what_can_be_proven.panel_exists: Strong - 158 panels with voltage/amperage in type names
what_can_be_proven.circuit_assigned: Strong - 7628 elements have Circuit Number parameter
what_can_be_proven.voltage_rating: Partial - encoded in panel family names (208v, 480v) but not on individual circuits
what_can_be_proven.dedicated_circuit: Partial - can check if circuit is shared but not if it should be dedicated

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Panel exists AND circuit number is assigned AND voltage matches requirement
evidence_matrix.max_safe_status: Met with parameter evidence, NeedsHumanReview without

what_can_be_proven.type_correct: Partial - GP, GFI, IG encoded in family names
what_can_be_proven.mounting_height: Partial - some family names include height (18 AFF, 40 AFF)

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Outlet type family exists AND circuit assigned
evidence_matrix.max_safe_status: Met for presence, NeedsHumanReview for count/placement

what_can_be_proven.type_correct: Strong - LED type, size, emergency designation in names

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Fixture type matches AND level correct
evidence_matrix.max_safe_status: Met for presence/type, NeedsHumanReview for controls/specification

what_can_be_proven.device_type: Partial - family names encode type (camera, card reader, speaker)
what_can_be_proven.count: Strong - can count devices per category

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Device category exists AND count is reasonable
evidence_matrix.max_safe_status: Met for device presence, NeedsHumanReview for cable/specification requirements

what_can_be_proven.type_and_tonnage: Partial - family/type names encode RTU tonnage (Aaon RTU 3 Ton, etc.)

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Equipment type family exists AND tonnage matches
evidence_matrix.max_safe_status: Met for presence only, NeedsHumanReview for manufacturer/controls/specification

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Bibb count >= expected AND RPZ present per zone

what_cannot_be_proven: Everything - no conduit elements in export
Everything - no controls elements in export

what_can_be_proven.ground_parameter_exists: Partial - grounding parameters may exist on some panels

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Grounding parameter populated with correct value
evidence_matrix.max_safe_status: NeedsHumanReview (even with parameters, field verification needed)

what_can_be_proven.manufacturer_parameter: Weak - parameter exists on all 21868 elements but values are typically empty or default

evidence_matrix.safe_met_conditions: Manufacturer parameter populated AND matches requirement text

what_cannot_be_proven: Everything - closeout deliverables are not modeled
Everything - field work is not modeled
